title: Conversations
description: Read-only audit surface for all CTOX communication across WhatsApp, Jami, Email, and MS Teams. Contact-centric timeline with channel-aware rendering and cross-links into Outbound, Matching, and Reports.

layout.left: Conversation list filtered by channel and search
layout.center: Selected conversation timeline with channel-aware messages
layout.right: Contact card, related business records, and CTOX agent attribution
